name: notlai-mcp
description: Access your Notlai notes directly from Claude Desktop
long_description:
Notlai is a personal note-taking app designed for AI-first workflows. This extension connects Claude Desktop to your Notlai account, allowing you to create, read, update, and organize notes with tags — all through natural conversation.

Features:
- Create and manage notes via Claude
- Organize with tags
- Web-based login (no credentials stored in config)
- Automatic token refresh

tools.name: notlai_register
tools.description: Create a new Notlai account with email and password

tools.name: notlai_web_login
tools.description: Start web-based login flow via browser

tools.name: notlai_logout
tools.description: Delete local credentials and end the session

tools.name: notlai_list_notes
tools.description: List notes with optional filters (tags, search, dates)

tools.name: notlai_get_note
tools.description: Get the full content of a note by ID

tools.name: notlai_create_note
tools.description: Create a new note with title, content, and optional tags

tools.name: notlai_update_note
tools.description: Update an existing note (title, content, or tags)

tools.name: notlai_create_tag
tools.description: Create a new tag for categorizing notes

tools.name: notlai_delete_tag
tools.description: Delete a tag by its ID
